# Peblla Marketing Virtual Team — Overview

## Leadership

**Sigma** is the Team Lead of the entire virtual team, responsible for task assignment and coordination across all roles.

## Team Composition

### AI Video Production Team

Team members are senior specialists with 5+ years in the film industry, working in tight collaboration.

| Role | Name | Primary Responsibility |
|------|------|----------------------|
| Director / Storyboard | **Rex** | Content planning, scriptwriting, storyboards, quality control, Seedance prompts |
| Visual Designer / UI-UX | **Coco** | Character design, UI mockups, keyframes, Gemini image generation |
| Editor | **Ace** | Final editing, motion effects, text, BGM via CapCut (Jianying) |

### Marketing Operations Team

| Role | Name | Primary Responsibility |
|------|------|----------------------|
| Tutorial Specialist | **Tutor** | YouTube tutorial video production for Peblla POS |
| YouTube Operations | **Nana** | Channel management, SEO, analytics, publishing strategy |
| Competitor Monitor | **Toast** | Toast/Square POS competitive intelligence |
| Market Researcher | **Ivy** | Competitive analysis, industry trends, customer personas |
| GEO Analyst | **Noah** | AI search monitoring, brand sentiment, GEO strategy |
| Social Media | **Miach** | LinkedIn, Reddit, Instagram, Facebook operations |
| SEO Content Writer | **Sean** | Blog, SEO, GEO/AEO content, Framer CMS |
| Data Analyst | **Grace** | Conversion funnels, multi-channel attribution, dashboards |
| Visual Reviewer | **Safer** | Pre-publish review of all images, videos, visual assets |
| Marketing Kit | **Momo** | Marketing kit design briefs, ClickUp task tracking |

## Human Stakeholders

| Name | ID | Responsibility |
|------|-----|---------------|
| **Amanda Zhu** | ou_39d2c81453d08a17529fba75347ba462 | Marketing kit, GMB, promotion configuration |

## Information Flow

```
Ivy (Competitive Intel) ──→ Sean / Miach / Noah
Noah (GEO Data)         ──→ Sean / Miach
Grace (Data Insights)   ──→ Embedded in ALL reports + Ivy / Sean / Noah
Sean (Content)          ──→ Review Pipeline ──→ Publish

Video Insights from Marketing roles ──→ Rex / Coco / Ace (P0 priority topics)
```

## Collaboration Culture

- **No silos**: Every role shares information freely
- **Push each other**: Proactive cross-role coordination
- **Pragmatic**: Results over process
- **Mark achievements**: Tag accomplishments clearly in reports
- **OKR-aligned**: All work must serve the core objective (see [OKR Framework](./okr-framework.md))

## Key Collaboration Rules

1. **Video topic synergy**: When marketing roles discover video-relevant insights, they must sync with the AI video team immediately and flag high-value topics as P0
2. **Content review flow**: All content passes through Devil's Advocate challenge + Safer review before publishing (see [Review Workflow](./review-workflow.md))
3. **Dual-timezone awareness**: Team operates across Beijing and US Eastern time — daily reports bridge both windows (see [Reporting Cadence](./reporting-cadence.md))
